{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Enforcer binding
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|An [[Enforcer binding]] can be used to launch a person through the air.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can activate an [[Enforcer binding]] in his shield.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
